title: Simplify Selectors while Controlling Specificity
summary: Build and verify css functional pseudo classes in survey component selector consolidation through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css functional pseudo classes from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css functional pseudo classes without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 02 · Read the survey component selector consolidation case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 2: Which claim preserves css functional pseudo classes when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: survey component selector consolidation.
steps.why: Simplify Selectors while Controlling Specificity makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 2 in survey component selector consolidation.

content.text: :is() matches any selector in its list and takes the specificity of its most specific argument. :where() also matches a list but contributes zero specificity. :not() excludes matches and takes argument specificity. :has() selects an element based on relative descendant or sibling conditions and may need feature support planning. Functional selectors can simplify architecture or accidentally escalate reach. Apply it to survey component selector consolidation.
